nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Defines web coding style conventions covering file organization, CSS custom properties, animation-only properties, semantic HTML usage, and naming guidelines to enforce consistency across frontend code.

nodes.name: design-quality.md
nodes.summary: Establishes web design quality standards including an anti-template policy, banned UI patterns, required qualities, and a component checklist to ensure high-quality, non-generic frontend output.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Specifies recommended Claude Code hook configurations for web projects, covering PostToolUse hooks for format-on-save, lint, type-check, and CSS lint, plus PreToolUse file size guards and Stop hooks for final build verification.
nodes.languageNotes: Describes hook JSON configuration patterns specific to the ECC harness, including PostToolUse, PreToolUse, and Stop hook categories with ordering guidance.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Documents preferred frontend architectural patterns including component composition (compound components, render props, container/presentational split), state management strategies, URL-as-state, and data fetching patterns (stale-while-revalidate, optimistic updates, parallel loading).

nodes.name: performance.md
nodes.summary: Defines web performance rules targeting Core Web Vitals, bundle budget constraints, loading strategies, image optimization, font loading, and animation performance with a final checklist.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Provides web security rules covering Content Security Policy (nonce-based CSP), XSS prevention, third-party script controls, HTTPS and security headers, and secure form handling.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Specifies web testing rules with a priority ordering across visual regression, accessibility, performance, cross-browser, and responsive testing, plus guidance on E2E test shape and unit test scope.
